name: Antsroute API
description:
This public API allows you to synchronize your data with Antsroute. After subscribing to Antsroute with the proper plan, you will be able to generate an API key for using this API.
Then you will be able to directly create service/delivery/collect in Antsroute planning or basket. It will also be easy to retrieve current status of your service(s)/delivery(s)/collect(s).

In order to use this API, you need an API key you can generate in your Antsroute account ( in Antsroute, click on your top right name and select API Key ). This API Key has to be added as a HTTP Header ( "cakey" ) for all your requests.To be able to test the API directly from this page, first click on the Authorize button below and paste your API key.
